name: gate-public-env-undeclared-wrapper-accept
description: The env gate is scoped to wrappers the CONTRACT references, not the whole catalog. The contract declares only `useLeafletMap` under `@ggui-samples/leaflet` (registered, no `requires`). The app catalog ALSO registers `@acme/mapbox`, whose `requires` lists `GGUI_PUBLIC_APP_MAPBOX_TOKEN` — unsatisfied, since `App.publicEnv` is empty — but the contract never references that wrapper, so it cannot affect this render's iframe. SPEC §7.7.3 walks `requires` for every wrapper the contract references; registered-but-undeclared wrappers MUST NOT fail the push. The gate MUST accept. Guards against a gate that validates the operator's entire catalog instead of the declared subset.
